scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build -w backend
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build:web && npm run test -w e2e
scripts.docker:prod:https: docker compose --env-file .env.production -f docker-compose.yml -f infra/docker/docker-compose.prod.yml -f infra/docker/docker-compose.https.yml up -d --build
scripts.zkp:ceremony:verify: docker run --rm -v ./backend/circuits:/circuits -w /circuits node:20-bookworm bash -c "npm i -g snarkjs@0.7.5 && sed -i 's/\r$//' ceremony/verify-ceremony.sh && chmod +x ceremony/verify-ceremony.sh && ./ceremony/verify-ceremony.sh"
scripts.zkp:ceremony:setup: docker run --rm -v ./backend/circuits:/circuits -w /circuits node:20-bookworm bash -c "apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq curl git && curl -L https://github.com/iden3/circom/releases/download/v2.1.9/circom-linux-amd64 -o /usr/local/bin/circom && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/circom && npm i -g snarkjs@0.7.5 && sed -i 's/\r$//' build-zkp-prod-setup.sh ceremony/run-multi-party.sh ceremony/contribute.sh ceremony/verify-ceremony.sh && chmod +x build-zkp-prod-setup.sh ceremony/*.sh && ./build-zkp-prod-setup.sh"
scripts.zkp:ceremony:run: docker run --rm -v ./backend/circuits:/circuits -w /circuits node:20-bookworm bash -c "npm i -g snarkjs@0.7.5 && sed -i 's/\r$//' ceremony/run-multi-party.sh ceremony/contribute.sh ceremony/verify-ceremony.sh && chmod +x ceremony/*.sh && ./ceremony/run-multi-party.sh"
